---
title: "Figure 7 — macro_IR validity map (total information distortion vs noise)"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Validity map, NOT a regime map. Total information distortion (GIDM = G_b^{-1/2} J G_b^{-1/2}, k_off, macro_IR)
over the design plane (Delta/tau x N_ch), at three noise levels. White = trustworthy (distortion -> 1); the black
line is the trustworthiness edge (distortion = 1.05). No hard regime boundaries: the distortion is a continuous
gradient in (N, Delta, noise), not domains. Two soft edge arrows mark the two axes of Gaussianization (more
channels; slower sampling). The three panels show the trustworthy region GROWING as noise Gaussianizes the
emission (multinomial convolved by a wider Gaussian).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r data}
NCHS   <- c(10,20,50,100,200,500,1000,2000,5000,10000)
NOISES <- c("0.1","0.5","1")
comp   <- "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Gaussian_Information_Distortion"
d <- map_dfr(NOISES, function(ns) map_dfr(NCHS, function(nc){
  f <- sprintf("../data/1c2ae6f/figure_3_G_nch_%d_nsim_10000_macro_IR_noise_%s_battery_sim_G.csv", nc, ns)
  if (!file.exists(f)) return(NULL)
  read.csv(f, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, probit == "mean", statistic == "value",
           param_index == param_col, param_index == 1) %>%
    transmute(noise = ns, N = nc, interval = interval_in_tau, gidm = value)
})) %>%
  mutate(lx = log10(interval), ly = log10(N),
         z = pmin(pmax(log10(gidm), log10(0.995)), log10(1.5)),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
```

```{r palette}
BR  <- log10(c(0.995, 1.02, 1.05, 1.1, 1.2, 1.35, 1.5))               # white below 1.02, reds above
PAL <- c("#F7F7F7", colorRampPalette(c("#FDDBC7","#F4A582","#D6604D","#B2182B","#67001F"),
                                      space = "Lab")(length(BR) - 2))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 11, fig.height = 4.3}
XB <- log10(c(.01,.1,1)); YB <- log10(c(10,100,1000,10000))
# soft edge arrows drawn only on the first panel
arrows_df <- data.frame(noisef = factor("noise 0.1", levels = levels(d$noisef)))
g <- ggplot(d, aes(lx, ly, z = z)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = BR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE, name = "info\ndistortion",
                    labels = c("1.02","1.05","1.1","1.2","1.35","1.5")) +
  geom_contour(breaks = log10(1.05), colour = "black", linewidth = .5) +               # trustworthiness edge
  geom_point(size = .35, colour = "grey45", alpha = .4) +
  # two soft axes-of-Gaussianization arrows out of the worst corner (first panel only), white to read on red
  geom_segment(data = arrows_df, aes(x = log10(0.0135), xend = log10(0.0135), y = log10(13), yend = log10(600)),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "white", linewidth = .5,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(.16,"cm"))) +
  geom_text(data = arrows_df, aes(x = log10(0.017), y = log10(120)), inherit.aes = FALSE,
            label = "more\nchannels", size = 2.5, colour = "white", lineheight = .85, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_segment(data = arrows_df, aes(x = log10(0.0125), xend = log10(0.11), y = log10(12), yend = log10(12)),
               inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "white", linewidth = .5,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(.16,"cm"))) +
  geom_text(data = arrows_df, aes(x = log10(0.017), y = log10(15.5)), inherit.aes = FALSE,
            label = "slower sampling", size = 2.5, colour = "white", hjust = 0, fontface = "bold") +
  facet_wrap(~ noisef, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = XB, labels = c(".01",".1","1"), expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = YB, labels = c("10","100","1000","10000"), expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(log10(.01), 0), ylim = c(1, 4)) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]),
       title = "Where the macro_IR Gaussian likelihood is trustworthy",
       subtitle = "total information distortion (k_off); white = trustworthy (→ 1), black line = distortion 1.05; the trustworthy region grows as noise Gaussianises") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(size = 7.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8.5), legend.key.size = unit(.32,"cm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7.6))
g
ggsave("Figure_7_validity_map.pdf", g, width = 11, height = 4.3)
```
